peeling paint on a window frame
wet cobblestones under a single light
cracked leather seats in a parked car
a coarse carpet worn smooth down the middle
flaking whitewash on a barn wall
the soft pilling of an old jumper
wet newspaper folded under a doorstep
a cracked plaster ceiling stained by damp
the oily gleam of a workshop bench
damp concrete under a bare bulb
a clean pane of glass with a single smear
the soft nap of a worn velvet curtain
a metal handrail chilled by winter
scuffed linoleum, yellowed around a sink
the slick chrome of a cheap diner counter
painted brick bulging under old moisture
a kitchen tile with a hairline crack
a car bonnet beaded with overnight rain
the scratched varnish of a church pew
a table covered in a faded oilcloth
a rusted gate hinge in a suburban garden
the soft bubble of peeling wallpaper
frosted glass blurred by condensation
a windowsill with ring marks from old cups
the dull shine of well-handled brass
a rubber doormat curled at one corner
the grit of old sugar on a formica counter
a radiator painted over so many times it has rounded edges
a staircase runner worn to its backing
a concrete step crumbling at one corner
the grainy surface of unpolished cement
a wooden draining board soft with age
a glazed tile gone milky with scratches
the fabric of a chair darkened by a single hand
a cold metal kitchen sink with dented edges
dusty slats of a venetian blind
a bathroom mirror foxed at the corners
a cheap laminate floor cracking at a seam
the soft collapse of an old foam cushion
a window blind stained brown by years of nicotine
a wool coat still damp across the shoulders
a copper pipe sweating in a cold cupboard
an enamel bowl chipped down to black metal
a hallway carpet bald at the doorstep
a wooden door swollen out of its frame
a scratched plexiglass notice board
the glazed skin of a china figurine
a section of wallpaper stained by an old leak
a thin cotton sheet across a cold mattress
a slate doorstep worn hollow in the middle
a kitchen worktop marked by a hot pan
the dull shine of worn bakelite switches
a plastic chair with a bent leg
a bare concrete floor pooled with grit
a hallway wall scuffed by a long parade of shoes
a steel door with a rust-weeping hinge
the fine dust sheen on a stored crate
an iron grate over a drain full of leaves
a reception desk edge rubbed pale by sleeves
a roll of worn lino lifting at a seam
a mantelpiece greyed by years of ash
the grainy glass of an old camera viewfinder
a stone step dark with fresh rain
a rubber mat in a shower with worn tread
a pew cushion flattened in the middle
an old fridge door sealed with yellowed tape
a formica table with a dark scorch mark
a toilet cistern cracked but still holding
a doorstep tile flecked with mica
an ashtray with a film of grey residue
the felt lining of a jewellery box, worn in one spot
